channel.title: Quality Assurance DAO – What is Quality Assurance DAO ?
channel.description: Recent content in What is Quality Assurance DAO ? on Quality Assurance DAO

item.title: Polis: ABC of Governance
item.description:
The conversation

Participate in a conversation about specific words and concepts that regularly circulate in Cardano and Project Catalyst.

Help resolve ambiguities of meaning. Support our ABC of Governance Fund 8 proposal.

Examples include: permissionless, decentralized, distributed, delegated voting, etc .

Click Agree, Disagree or Pass. Then add your own perspective.

Please note that suggestions are moderated.
